description: Named author profiles for blog post attribution. Cycle through these to improve E-E-A-T signals over generic 'CollabGrow Team' attribution.

ava-chen.name: Ava Chen
ava-chen.bio: Creator partnerships specialist with 7+ years working with mid-tier influencers across TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram. Focuses on deal qualification and contract review.

marcus-okafor.name: Marcus Okafor
marcus-okafor.bio: Former brand-side influencer marketing lead turned creator advocate. Writes about brand vetting, scam patterns, and the legal side of sponsorship deals.

priya-shah.name: Priya Shah
priya-shah.bio: Talent manager working with niche creators in beauty, lifestyle, and UGC. Covers platform-specific deal strategy and creator-fit evaluation.
